explanations.pt-br: RunnablePassthrough repassa input original enquanto retriever injeta context.
explanations.en-us: RunnablePassthrough passes original input while retriever injects context.

explanations.pt-br: Execução: input 'O que é RAG?' vira 'question', retriever vira 'context'.
explanations.en-us: Execution: input 'What is RAG?' becomes 'question', retriever becomes 'context'.
